stemHtml: For an inland aerodrome, how does the vertical extent of the friction layer and amount of turbulence in this layer change in the late afternoon in midsummer, compared to the same time in winter (assuming similar surface wind conditions)?

options.a: Increase in vertical extent and decrease in turbulence.
options.b: Decrease in vertical extent and increase in turbulence.
options.c: Increase in both vertical extent and turbulence.
options.d: Decrease in both vertical extent and turbulence.
